bodyHtml:
Salesforce allows its clients and partners to guide the internal product teams to prioritize features in their favorite products. The platform to facilitate this is called the IdeaExchange.

You can look at other people's ideas or submit your own on this website. Using a "points" system, you can vote for specific ideas to give them more visibility.

Over the years, I have created and voted for some of these ideas. On this page, I have made an overview of all these ideas!
author: Thomas Theunen
bodyMarkdown:
Salesforce allows its clients and partners to guide the internal product teams to prioritize features in their favorite products. The platform to facilitate this is called the [IdeaExchange](https://ideas.salesforce.com/s/search#t=All&sort=relevancy).

You can look at other people's ideas or submit your own on this website. Using a "points" system, you can vote for specific ideas to give them more visibility.

Over the years, I have created and voted for some of these ideas. On this page, I have made an overview of all these ideas!
